title: State of Distressed: Trucano on Distressed Investing’s Evolution

And as a fiduciary, they’re required to do it.” Bloomberg Intelligence’s Phil Brendel and Noel Hebert sit down with Trucano (formerly of BlackRock, Cente

title: Nvidia's Jensen Huang Spotted Eating Noodles on Beijing Sidewalk During Trump Visit

summary:
Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang was spotted eating Beijing’s famous fried bean sauce noodles.

Huang, who is in Beijing as part of Donald Trump’s state visit to China, seemed perfectly content relishing the local staple right on the sidewalk. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why SocGen's Albert Edwards Sees Double-Digit Inflation Coming Back | Odd Lots
title_cn: 为什么法国兴业银行的阿尔伯特·爱德华兹（Albert Edwards）认为两位数的通胀将会回归？零股
summary: Making a long career as a bear at a sell-side institution is tough. Generally financial markets have done quite well which means forecasting doom and gloom is, usually, only tenable for so long. Which is why we wanted to talk to one of the most successful bears out there. Société Générale has let Albert Edwards out of the bear cage for today's episode. Edwards knows his reputation as a bear is well deserved: He believes, among other things, double-digit inflation is in the offing. We also talk about the attention span of readers on the buy-side, what success looks like for a bear, and how a bear avoids getting fired. (Source: Bloomberg)

summary: Anthropic PBC’s legal dispute with the US government over whether the company’s artificial intelligence models will be banned from federal agencies has emerged as a financial threat to other businesses.

title: Tech Stocks Power Wall Street Gains | The Close 5/14/2026
title_cn: 科技股推动华尔街上涨收盘价 2026 年 5 月 14 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are SoFI Investment strategy head Liz Thomas, Dow Chair & CEO Jim Fitterling, Meredith Whitney Advisory Group CEO Meredith Whitney, VF Corporation CEO Bracken Darrell, Morgan Stanley’s Michelle Weaver, UC San Diego’s Caroline Freund, Bain Capital Partner Angelo Rufino, Invesco President & CEO Andrew Schlossberg, Once Upon A Farm Co-Founder & CEO John Foraker (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rally in Top Space Stocks Sets Short Sellers Up for Squeeze
title_cn: 顶级空间股的反弹使卖空者面临挤压
summary: Two top performing space stocks have been on blistering rallies that risk soon burning short sellers betting against the highfliers, according to data provider S3 Partners.

title: Apollo’s West Technology Is in Talks to Sell Remaining Business
title_cn: Apollo 的 West Technology 正在洽谈出售剩余业务
summary: Apollo Global Management Inc.-backed West Technology is engaged in exclusive talks to sell its remaining operating business to a counter-party, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Musk, Altman Make Final Pitches to Jury in Battle Over OpenAI
title_cn: 马斯克和奥特曼在 OpenAI 之争中向陪审团提出最后建议
summary: A jury will soon cast a vote and a judge will ultimately decide the outcome of a high-stakes showdown between Elon Musk and Sam Altman over OpenAI, the artificial intelligence startup they founded together more than a decade ago.

title: AI Buildout Drives 76% Power Bill Jump on Largest US Grid
title_cn: AI 建设推动美国最大电网的电费上涨 76%
summary: Power prices on the largest electric grid in the US jumped 76% in the first quarter due to rampant demand from data centers, adding to pressure on its operator to alleviate the strain on consumers.

title: Andy Jassy Is Rewriting Amazon's Playbook for the AI Age
title_cn: 安迪·贾西 (Andy Jassy) 正在重写亚马逊的人工智能时代剧本
summary: Andy Jassy is pouring billions into AI as Amazon faces its biggest challenge yet. Brad Stone and Matt Day have more in the latest issue of Businessweek (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cerebras Goes Public in Year's Biggest IPO | Bloomberg Tech 5/14/2026
title_cn: Cerebras 完成今年最大规模的 IPO |彭博科技 2026 年 5 月 14 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow breaks down why Cisco shares jumped the most since 2011 after the company's earnings results. Plus, more details emerge after President Trump's meeting with China's Xi Jinping, Cerebras CEO Andrew Feldman joins ahead of the company's public listing, and Caroline Hyde sits down with the CEOs of Ericsson and Oura on the sidelines of the Spark Summit in California. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Applied Materials’ Sales Forecast Gets Boost From AI Demand
title_cn: 应用材料公司的销售预测受到人工智能需求的推动
summary: Applied Materials Inc., the largest US supplier of semiconductor equipment, gave sales and profit forecasts that far exceeded analysts’ estimates, fueled by soaring demand for AI computing and memory chips.

title: Emerging Currencies Dip as US Retail Data Boosts Dollar
title_cn: 美国零售数据提振美元，新兴货币下跌
summary: Most emerging-market currencies fell Thursday on the back of a stronger dollar after US retail sales signaled consumer resilience in the world’s largest economy despite sharply higher gasoline prices.

title: UK Shows Few Leaders Last in Ungovernable Era
title_cn: 英国在难以治理的时代很少有领导人能坚持到最后
summary: Starmer’s premiership at risk as traditional two-party UK political system shatters.

title: Finland’s First Drone Scare Near Helsinki Disrupts Flights
title_cn: 芬兰赫尔辛基附近首次发生无人机恐慌事件，导致航班中断
summary: Finland warned the public of drones possibly entering its airspace, for the first time near Helsinki, in the early hours of Friday.

title: Winners and Losers From Trump and Xi’s Two-Day Beijing Summit
title_cn: 特朗普和习近平为期两天的北京峰会的赢家和输家
summary: Donald Trump got the pageantry he craved during his trip to China. But the US president concluded the summit largely where he began, receiving little help from his “friend” Xi Jinping in dealing with a messy war in Iran and a challenging political climate at home.

title: Trump Announces Plans For Statue Garden in Potomac River Park
title_cn: 特朗普宣布波托马克河公园雕像花园计划
summary: President Donald Trump said he would install his proposed sculpture garden of “American Heroes” in West Potomac Park, a stretch near the National Mall that includes the Martin Luther King Jr. Memorial.

title: UAE Tried in Vain to Get Saudis to Coordinate on Iran Response
title_cn: 阿联酋徒劳地试图让沙特协调伊朗的反应
summary: The United Arab Emirates tried to persuade neighboring states including Saudi Arabia and Qatar to take part in a coordinated military response to Iran’s strikes and was left frustrated when they refused, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Xi Hails ‘Landmark’ Summit as Trump Departs
title_cn: 特朗普离任之际，习近平称赞峰会具有“里程碑意义”
summary: US President Donald Trump's two-day visit to China has come to an end. President Xi Jinping hailed the results of the summit and touted an agreement on a new relationship for the countries, projecting optimism despite unresolved tensions and limited deals announced so far.  Bloomberg's Minmin Low reports from Beijing. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump-Xi Summit: What Was Discussed
title_cn: 特习会：讨论了什么
summary: US President Donald Trump's two-day visit to China has come to an end. President Xi Jinping said the two nations agreed to stabilize trade relations. Bloomberg's Brendan Murray recaps the summit and what key issues were discussed by the leaders. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kazakhstan’s New Adilet Party Seeks to Secure Tokayev’s Power Revamp
title_cn: 哈萨克斯坦新成立的阿迪莱特党寻求确保托卡耶夫的权力重组
summary: Kazakhstan’s President Kassym-Jomart Tokayev is looking to secure his legacy by backing a new political party in the latest move to overhaul the country’s political system.

title: Magyar Slams Secret $4.3 Billion Orban-Era Defense Deal
title_cn: 马扎尔猛烈抨击欧尔班时代43亿美元的秘密国防协议
summary: Hungary’s former government under Viktor Orban signed a 1.3 trillion forint ($4.3 billion) contract with 4iG Nyrt. weeks before it lost power, one of the biggest public procurements in the nation’s history, according to news website HVG.

title: Soybeans Fall as US Comments Fail to Lift China Trade Hopes
title_cn: 美国言论未能提振中国贸易希望，大豆下跌
summary: Soybean futures fell, reversing course after comments from US officials during their China trip offered little beyond existing pledges and few new details on potential agricultural purchases. Corn futures also pared gains.

title: Starmer’s Rival Burnham Opens Path to a Challenge, Hitting Gilts
title_cn: 斯塔默的竞争对手伯纳姆开辟了挑战之路，击中后备母猪
summary: UK government bond yields jumped Friday morning as one of Keir Starmer’s top rivals, Andy Burnham, prepared to run for parliament — a process necessary for him to potentially topple the Prime Minister.

title: Xi Hails ‘Landmark’ Trump Summit, Says Many Outcomes Achieved
title_cn: 习近平称赞特朗普峰会具有“里程碑意义”，称取得了许多成果
summary: Chinese leader Xi Jinping hailed the results of his meetings with US President Donald Trump and touted an agreement on a new relationship for their countries, projecting optimism despite unresolved tensions and limited deals announced so far.

title: Trump Projects Confidence on Iran War While China Stays Cautious
title_cn: 特朗普对伊朗战争表现出信心，而中国则保持谨慎
summary: President Donald Trump said the US and China share common goals for ending the Iran war, while Beijing struck a measured tone in urging further diplomacy.

title: Labour Power Struggle Highlights UK Fiscal Dilemma
title_cn: 劳工权力斗争凸显英国财政困境
summary: Hetal Mehta, chief economist at St. James's Place, comments on the UK fiscal situation and gilt market reaction as pressure on Keir Starmer mounts following moves by senior Labour Party rivals to potentially challenge him as prime minister. Mehta tells Bloomberg Television that a more left-leaning leader raises the prospect of higher spending and higher taxes, which gets "into a territory where you disincentivize economic activity." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Anwar Won’t Pardon Jho Low as 1MDB Fugitive Seeks Clemency in US
title_cn: 安华不会赦免刘特佐，因为1MDB逃犯在美国寻求宽大处理
summary: Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim said Malaysia won’t consider any pardon request involving Jho Low, the alleged mastermind behind the multibillion-dollar 1MDB scandal who is seeking clemency from US President Donald Trump, Bernama reported.

title: Burnham's Move Escalates Labour Revolt Against Starmer
title_cn: 伯纳姆的举动加剧了工党对斯塔默的反抗
summary: Mayor of Manchester Andy Burnham secured a path to challenge Keir Starmer for the UK prime minister’s job, after a Labour Party Member of Parliament quit his seat in the House of Commons. Burnham said he would seek permission from Labour’s National Executive Committee to run for the freed-up seat in a by-election. Bloomberg's Alex Morgan reports from Downing Street. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Putin to Visit Beijing Only Days After Trump Departs, SCMP Says
title_cn: 《南华早报》称，特朗普离开几天后，普京将访问北京
summary: Russian leader Vladimir Putin will visit Beijing on May 20, the South China Morning Post reported, which would be days after President Xi Jinping’s summit in the Chinese capital with his US counterpart Donald Trump.

title: Trump Says China Offered Help With Iran Negotiations
title_cn: 特朗普表示中国愿意为伊朗谈判提供帮助
summary: US President Donald Trump signaled China is willing to support negotiations with Iran, as he pushes for a diplomatic resolution to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Trump is visiting his Chinese counterpart President Xi Jinping in Beijing. Bloomberg's Stuart Livingstone-Wallace has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Skeptic to Lead Solomon Islands After Pact With Beijing
title_cn: 与北京达成协议后，中国怀疑论者将领导所罗门群岛
summary: The Solomon Islands, a small Pacific nation caught in the China and US competition, elected a new prime minister seen as less friendly to Beijing than his predecessors.

title: India Hikes Fuel Prices For The First Time in Four Years
title_cn: 印度四年来首次提高燃油价格
summary: India’s state-run refiners have raised fuel prices for the first time in four years, as New Delhi yields to crude prices pushed higher by the war in Iran, and to the resulting financial pressures battering its processors.

title: What Is The Thucydides Trap and Why Did Xi Raise It With Trump?
title_cn: 什么是修昔底德陷阱？习近平为何向特朗普提出这个陷阱？
summary: When President Xi Jinping met US leader Donald Trump in Beijing on Thursday, he posed a big question: Can China and the US avoid the “Thucydides Trap”? It’s a phrase that sounds academic, but it goes to the heart of Beijing’s ambitions for their relationship.

title: Russia Presses College Students to Fill Ranks of Drone Pilots
title_cn: 俄罗斯敦促大学生填补无人机飞行员的空缺
summary: Students at one of Russia’s leading engineering universities are getting a lucrative offer: ditch their studies for a year, fly drones for the military and earn more than 5 million rubles ($68,275) in pay as well as free tuition on their return.

title: Xi Says China and US Agree to Stabilize Trade Relations
title_cn: 习近平称中美同意稳定贸易关系
summary: Donald Trump poses for photos with Xi Jinping at Zhongnanhai Garden.

title: Trump Traded Nvidia, Boeing, Intel in Flurry of Transactions
title_cn: 特朗普在一系列交易中交易了英伟达、波音和英特尔
summary: President Donald Trump’s latest financial disclosures show that he made a slew of stock and bond purchases with major American companies in the first quarter of the year totaling in the tens of millions of dollars and possibly more.

title: Takaichi to Visit Korean President’s Hometown to Strengthen Ties
title_cn: 高市将访问韩国总统故乡以加强联系
summary: South Korean President Lee Jae Myung and Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi will meet in the South Korean city of Andong next week, extending a highly personalized diplomatic exchange at a time of shifting dynamics between the US and China, and mounting uncertainty over regional security.

title: Labor Unrest Threatens to Roil Australian LNG Export Projects
title_cn: 劳工骚乱可能会扰乱澳大利亚液化天然气出口项目
summary: Australia’s liquefied natural gas sector is facing the prospect of industrial action at major export operations, adding another supply risk for Asian buyers already scrambling for cargoes after disruptions in the Middle East.

title: Bolsonaro Says Scandal-Hit Banker Funds Weren’t for His Brother
title_cn: 博索纳罗称丑闻缠身的银行家资金不适合他的兄弟
summary: Brazilian presidential candidate Flavio Bolsonaro denied that money he sought from a scandal-plagued banker was meant for his younger brother amid mounting pressure on his fledgling campaign.

title: Myanmar Junta’s Forced Remittance Rules Pull in $5.6 Billion
title_cn: 缅甸军政府强制汇款规则吸引56亿美元资金
summary: Myanmar has turned migrant remittances into its biggest source of foreign inflows, finance ministry data seen by Bloomberg News show, after the military imposed rules that pressure citizens abroad to send money home.

title: Trump Says He Wants Iran’s Uranium Mostly for ‘Public Relations’
title_cn: 特朗普表示他想要伊朗的铀主要是为了“公共关系”
summary: President Donald Trump said the US objective of recovering highly enriched uranium from Iran was “more for public relations than it is for anything else,” while reiterating his commitment to removing the nuclear material.
